race.comment: THEBELMONTGANGSTER (14) backs up from last week at Sandown Hillside having won very well there in a return to form. He'd put the writing on the wall two back with a strong effort and seems to be racing far more genuinely now. He maps perfectly on pace and provided the track stays rain-affected, he'll go close once more. TEN COMMANDMENTS (8) was dominant winning first up at Sandown Lakeside in midweek company, making a sustained run and bolting in by 4.5 lengths. That was his first run for the Maher yard and he'll take beating if he can go on with it. CAPPER THIRTYNINE (9) brings all the right form through Lovelycut and should be right there off a let-up. ROSA AOTEAROA (17) is a little niggle at the trip but should find the track a bit better than the heavy surface last time which he struggled on.
